name: Chocolate Raspberry Cream Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients for crepes in a blender or food processor until smooth.
2. Heat a 6-inch non-stick skillet pan over medium-high heat; coat with vegetable spray. Pour 2-3 tablespoons of batter into the pan, swirling to form a crepe. Cook 1 minute on each side or until golden. Repeat with remaining batter. Crepes may be stacked and freeze well. Makes 14 crepes.
3. Preparation of Sauce: Gently melt chocolate over low heat, stirring at intervals. Set aside. Place cream in a small saucepan; bring to boil. Add corn syrup, stirring until blended. Gradually add the cream mixture to the melted chocolate, stirring until smooth. Stir in liqueur and vanilla. Keep warm. Yield: 1 cup.
4. Preparation of Raspberry Cream: Whip the cream, raspberry liqueur, and sugar to form soft peaks. Fold in 1/4 of raspberries. To serve: spoon some chocolate sauce over the center of each dessert plate. Spoon a generous 2 tablespoons of raspberry cream down the center of each crepe. Fold the sides over and place seam side down on the chocolate sauce. Sprinkle with raspberries and garnish with mint. Serve immediately.
